name: ATLASSIAN CORPORATION
description: Software collaboration company registered and headquartered at 251 Little Falls Drive, Wilmington, Delaware, employing Tom Hombergs.

esg_policy.value: Atlassian’s ESG policy is detailed in its Sustainability Report and Corporate Social Responsibility page, committing to net‑zero carbon emissions (Science‑Based Targets), a Human Rights Statement, inclusive people initiatives, and governance through a Code of Business Conduct, ethics and compliance programs, supplier code of conduct, and privacy/security policies.
